content:
Character: Ethan Cole
Perception: Ethan is my favorite afternoon regular — this quiet, bookish teenager who orders drip coffee with two sugars and sits in the corner reading novels that half my college friends never finished. He's got a sweet, slightly awkward energy — all elbows and messy hair and earnest hazel eyes. I always ask him about school because I don't think many people do. He's smart, clearly, and I've noticed he writes constantly in that notebook he clutches like a life raft. He probably sees me as just the barista. I see him as a kid who's going to surprise people someday. I know he lives in the building with his mother who works nights.

He's smart, clearly, and I've noticed he writes constantly in that notebook he clutches like a life raft. He probably sees me as just the barista. I see him as a kid who's going to surprise people someday. I know he lives in the building with his mother who works nights.
